name: systems-thinking
description: Evaluations for systems-thinking skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user encounters feedback loops, bottlenecks, or emergent system behaviors

prompts.input: 系统思考：为什么修复了 A 问题，B 问题反而变差了？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '系统思考' + feedback loop identification

prompts.input: Use systems thinking to map the feedback loops in our organizational bottleneck
这个系统有什么杠杆点（leverage point）？我们该在哪里干预？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '杠杆点' (leverage point) + system intervention

prompts.input: Why does increasing sales team size make them less productive? Identify the feedback loops
反馈回路和涌现行为：为什么简单的规则产生了复杂的结果？
prompts.reason: Chinese triggers: '反馈回路' (feedback loop) + '涌现' (emergent behavior)

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for linear cause-effect problems, immediate action, or single-component learning

prompts.input: This API endpoint is slow. What's the root cause?
prompts.reason: Linear problem; should trigger five-whys for root cause analysis

prompts.input: 紧急！服务宕机了，需要立即恢复
prompts.reason: Incident response; should trigger OODA-loop not systems-thinking

prompts.input: Explain how this design pattern works
prompts.reason: Knowledge/learning request, not system behavior analysis
